title: Gaimon Guards the Island of Rare Animals
description: On pages 23–26, Luffy, Zoro, and Nami reach a strange island where Gaimon and the rare animals guard a lonely mystery.
scene: The crew’s lighthearted exploration turns into a small fable about treasure, isolation, and the life Gaimon built after being trapped on the island.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What the hell are you talking about?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Stop joking around, and drop the treasure chests, now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hurry up and drop them to me!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Don't you dare come down here again!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Forget about it! It's okay if he doesn't want to drop them here!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: How can that be okay? That's your treasure!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It might be a possi- Billy...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I always try hard not to think about it...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But, by the time we found the map, the treasure had already been taken by other people...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: How can that be... the treasure you guarded for 20 years...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: is just a bunch of empty chests!

summary: This part works as a pause between major arcs, showing that the sea contains strange lives and unusual dreams beyond simple battles.
